g(o,{Q;p},n,f)end return Q end,function(o)local n,g=-284502+284503,o[89654+-89653]while g do Y[g],n=Y[g]-(879412+-879411),(182880-182879)+n if-289860-(-289860)==Y[g]then Y[g],x[g]=nil,nil end end return(W(-687593+12707218,{}))(f(k))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[n(-488503-(-533203))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
